message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.allequal wrapper parity (franken_numpy-5m29)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ma.allequal(a, b, fill_value=True)
returning True only when every entry matches, using fill_value as the
truth assignment for masked positions. Test covers equal/unequal plain
arrays, symmetric-mask MaskedArrays under both fill_value paths,
asymmetric masks where fill_value flips the outcome, NaN-containing
arrays returning False, and 2-D equal arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
